trend.name: Bandit Blockade
trend.blurb: Bandits are blocking the main roads. People want weapons, and merchants are panic-selling imported luxuries they can't transport.

trend.name: Mana Surge
trend.blurb: The local leylines are overflowing. Mages are paying top dollar for magical goods, but standard steel is practically being given away.

trend.name: Fever Epidemic
trend.blurb: A terrible fever has hit the town. Healing items are scarce, while monster hunters have abandoned their posts, leaving their haul behind.

trend.name: Inquisitor's Visit
trend.blurb: The High Inquisitor is in town looking for heresy. Holy relics are prized, while alchemists are desperately dumping their sketchy ingredients to avoid suspicion.

trend.name: Bumper Crop
trend.blurb: An incredibly successful harvest has flooded the market with cheap organic goods, leaving townsfolk feeling wealthy enough to buy fine weapons.

trend.name: Foreign Fleet Docked
trend.blurb: A fleet from across the sea has arrived. They are buying up local raw materials in bulk and dumping standard consumables at wholesale prices.

trend.name: Grand Melee
trend.blurb: The seasonal fighting tournament is today! Potions and steel are selling fast, but nobody cares about dusty old relics or magic tricks right now.
